body.title: Boredom/idle detector — 'how could I be using my time better?'
body.result: BoredomSource in push_sources.py fires BOREDOM_DETECTED when arousal flat for 20min; foreman_scan() in worker_foreman.py checks queue and launches next worker; PROC_BOREDOM_FOREMAN and PROC_WHAT_ARE_WE_WORKING_ON habits seeded to live DB. Pipeline: idle arousal → BOREDOM_DETECTED → ACTION_IMPULSE → PROC_BOREDOM_FOREMAN → foreman_scan() → worker launch. Env-var configurable window and threshold.
body.description:
Implement boredom/idle detector with foreman scan loop. Inner question: 'how could I be using my time better?' Igor self-initiates when idle. #341

CALIBRATION (2026-03-23): Boredom = SLIGHT negative — mild aversive drift, enough to make stillness less comfortable than motion. Too strong = anxiety + freeze. Too weak = no-mind attractor wins. Slight is load-bearing. This is the push half; see T-anticipation-pull for the directional pull half.
